title: Robinhood L2 sparks ETH optimism, Saylor 'muddies waters.' Hodler's Digest, July 5-12, 2026

title: Strategy's Saylor needs clarity in BTC pivot message to convince investors: StanChart
summary: Standard Chartered sees communication challenges facing the biggest digital asset treasury company as "muddying the waters" for Bitcoin in the near term.

title: Treasury Two-Year Yield Rises to Highest Since 2025 on Oil Gain
summary: The Treasury two-year yield climbed to its highest level in more than 16 months as renewed tensions in Iran pushed up oil prices, fanning speculation that the Federal Reserve will tighten policy to keep inflationary pressure in check.

title: US Says It Conducted Fresh Round of Strikes Against Iran
summary: The US releases videos from unidentified locations, saying its forces completed a third round of strikes against Iran. It prompted retaliatory strikes from Tehran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.

title: How to Make Product Ads With AI for TikTok and YouTube—For (Almost) Free
summary: One product photo, three AI tools, and about 20 minutes: Here's the full workflow for generating a sales video without a camera, a model, or a studio.

title: What Is Robinhood Chain? The Ethereum Layer-2 Network for Tokenized Stocks
summary: Robinhood Chain is an Ethereum layer-2 network built with Arbitrum technology for tokenized assets, crypto apps, and on-chain financial products.

title: Crypto fatwa sparks debate over Pakistan’s digital asset framework
summary: Pakistan’s crypto regulator held talks with prominent Islamic scholar Mufti Taqi Usmani after a fatwa declared crypto purchases impermissible under Islam.

title: US launches another round of strikes on Iran as ceasefire teeters

title: Oil prices jump as US and Iran step up tit-for-tat strikes
